videos.title: Rachel Brinkley - Join the BRICS to Stop World War III - Dec. 7th, 2014
videos.description:
New England Schiller Institute Conference - December 7th, 2014

Rachel Brinkley, Former Congressional Candidate.  Presentation on the danger of world war and colored revolution, and the fight by the Schiller Institute to build the New Silk Road project.

videos.title: Helga Zepp-LaRouche - On the Brink of WWIII - Dec. 7th, 2014
videos.description:
New England Schiller Institute Conference - December 7th, 2014

Frank remarks by Helga Zepp-LaRouche, Founder and Chairwoman of the Schiller Institute.  If the average American knew how close we are to World War III, they would be out in the streets, demanding a change of the current Obama Administration's policy.  And the need to build the New Silk Road Project.

videos.title: Ricardo Lopez performs China's National Anthem "March of the Volunteers" Dec 7, 2014

chapters.title: What is China's national anthem called?

videos.description:
New England Schiller Institute Conference - December 7th, 2014

Ricardo Lopez performs China's National Anthem "March of the Volunteers" written by Tian Han
Piano Accompaniment by Brent Bedford

English Translation:
Arise! All those who refuse to be slaves!
Let our flesh and blood forge our new Great Wall!
The Chinese nation has arrived at its most perilous time.
Every person is forced to expel his very last roar.
Arise! Arise! Arise!
One million hearts beating as one,
Brave the enemy's fire, March on!
Brave the enemy's fire, March on!
March on! March on! On!
